name: blog_beat
schema:
CREATE TABLE "blog_beat" (
   [id] INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
   [created] TEXT,
   [slug] TEXT,
   [metadata] TEXT,
   [search_document] TEXT,
   [import_ref] TEXT,
   [card_image] TEXT,
   [is_draft] INTEGER,
   [beat_type] TEXT,
   [title] TEXT,
   [url] TEXT,
   [commentary] TEXT,
   [series_id] TEXT REFERENCES [blog_series]([id]),
   [image_alt] TEXT,
   [image_url] TEXT,
   [note] TEXT
)
